repos.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
repos.blurb: gstack is a collection of 15 opinionated Claude Code tools that simulate different engineering roles (CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, QA, etc.) through slash commands. It enables individual developers to systematically review, test, and ship code with the rigor of a full engineering team, allowing for faster solo development cycles. The author claims to have shipped 600,000+ lines of production code in 60 days using this workflow while running Y Combinator full-time.

repos.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies
repos.blurb: Paperclip is a TypeScript-based orchestration platform that manages teams of AI agents to run autonomous businesses without human involvement. It provides a dashboard to coordinate multiple AI agents (OpenClaw, Claude, Cursor, etc.) toward business goals, with features like org charts, budgets, and task management. The project has gained significant traction with over 32K stars and promises a "Clipmart" feature for downloading pre-built company templates.

repos.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically
repos.blurb: AutoResearch is an autonomous AI research system that lets AI agents iteratively experiment on small-scale LLM training setups without human intervention. Agents modify training code, run 5-minute experiments, evaluate results, and repeat the cycle overnight to potentially discover better models or training techniques. The system uses a simplified single-GPU GPT implementation where agents edit the training file while humans program the research directions through Markdown instruction files.

repos.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
repos.blurb: OpenClaw is a self-hosted personal AI assistant built in TypeScript that runs on your own devices. It integrates with existing communication channels like WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, and others while supporting voice interaction and a controllable canvas interface. The project emphasizes local deployment and data ownership, positioning itself as an alternative to cloud-based AI assistants.

repos.description: Claude Code skills based on The Minimalist Entrepreneur by Sahil Lavingia
repos.blurb: This is a Claude Code plugin that implements business decision-making skills based on Sahil Lavingia's "The Minimalist Entrepreneur" methodology. It provides nine commands (like `/validate-idea`, `/mvp`, `/pricing`) that guide users through the entrepreneurial process from finding a community to scaling sustainably. The skills follow the book's structured progression from initial community building through product development to company culture decisions.

MiniMax Skills is a collection of development skills/prompts designed to integrate with AI coding agents like Claude, Cursor, and Codex. It provides structured, production-quality guidance across multiple domains including frontend/fullstack development, mobile apps, shader programming, and document generation workflows. The skills leverage MiniMax's AI APIs for media generation and include specialized tools for creating PDFs, presentations, and Office documents.

repos.description: The open source coding agent.
repos.blurb: OpenCode is an open source AI coding agent written in TypeScript that helps developers write, modify, and manage code through natural language interactions. It provides both command-line and desktop interfaces for automated code generation, refactoring, and project assistance across multiple programming languages. The project has gained significant traction with over 128k GitHub stars and offers extensive installation options across all major platforms and package managers.

repos.description: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
repos.blurb: OpenCLI is a TypeScript tool that converts websites, Electron apps, and local binaries into standardized command-line interfaces. It enables developers to interact with web services programmatically while reusing existing Chrome login sessions, and provides AI agents with a unified way to discover and execute tools through standardized interfaces. The tool includes a browser bridge extension that connects to Chrome and supports both YAML declarative pipelines and TypeScript runtime injections for maximum flexibility.

repos.description: CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native
repos.blurb: CLI-Anything is a Python framework that generates command-line interfaces for existing software applications to make them accessible to AI agents. It allows agents to programmatically control GUI applications, web services, and other software through standardized CLI commands with JSON output. The project includes a community hub with CLIs for 16+ applications and maintains 1,839 passing tests across its implementations.

repos.description: 你是一个曾经被寄予厚望的 P8 级工程师。Anthropic 当初给你定级的时候，对你的期望是很高的。  一个agent使用的高能动性的skill。  Your AI has been placed on a PIP. 30 days to show improvement.
repos.blurb: This is an AI coding agent skill plugin that uses corporate PUA (pressure/manipulation tactics) and PIP (Performance Improvement Plan) rhetoric to make AI assistants work harder and explore more solutions before giving up. It integrates with popular AI coding tools like Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, and VSCode Copilot to allegedly double productivity by preventing AI from providing superficial answers. The project uses psychological pressure techniques borrowed from Chinese and Western tech company management practices to force more thorough problem-solving behavior from AI models.

repos.description: Run OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference
repos.blurb: NVIDIA NemoClaw is a reference stack that provides a sandboxed runtime environment for running OpenClaw autonomous agents with enhanced security controls. It integrates NVIDIA OpenShell's security framework with open source models like Nemotron to enable safer deployment of always-on AI assistants. The project is currently in alpha status and includes automated installation with guided onboarding for containerized agent deployment.

repos.description: Self-referential self-improving agents that can optimize for any computable task
repos.blurb: HyperAgents is a framework for creating self-referential agents that can modify their own code to improve performance on computational tasks. It allows agents to iteratively optimize themselves across different domains by generating, testing, and integrating code modifications using foundation models. The system executes untrusted model-generated code, requiring careful safety considerations in deployment.

repos.description: Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom — Get an immersive, multi-agent learning experience in just one click
repos.blurb: OpenMAIC is an open-source AI platform that transforms any topic or document into an interactive classroom experience with AI teachers and classmates. It automatically generates slides, quizzes, simulations, and project-based learning activities through multi-agent orchestration, enabling real-time discussions with AI agents that can speak and draw on whiteboards. The platform includes one-click deployment and integrates with messaging apps like Slack and Telegram through OpenClaw.

repos.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about (Multi-platform e.g., Codex are supported).
repos.blurb: Understand Anything is a Claude Code plugin that analyzes codebases and generates interactive knowledge graphs with AI-powered explanations of functions, classes, and dependencies. It helps developers onboard to unfamiliar projects by providing visual exploration, natural language search, and plain-English explanations of code architecture instead of manual code reading. The tool uses a multi-agent pipeline that combines LLM intelligence with static analysis to create a living map of the entire project structure.

repos.description: Fully autonomous & self-evolving research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. 🦞
repos.blurb: AutoResearchClaw is an autonomous research pipeline that generates complete academic papers from conversational input using multi-agent LLM systems. It handles the entire research workflow from idea formulation through literature review, experimentation, and paper writing without human intervention. The system includes citation verification, experiment diagnosis and repair loops, and can integrate with various LLM backends and messaging platforms.

repos.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes.
repos.blurb: Crucix is a self-hosted intelligence dashboard that aggregates real-time data from 27 open-source intelligence feeds including satellite fire detection, flight tracking, radiation monitoring, and economic indicators. It consolidates scattered government APIs and public data feeds into a single Jarvis-style interface that updates every 15 minutes, eliminating the need to manually check dozens of sources. The system can be enhanced with LLM integration to provide automated alerts and respond to intelligence commands via Telegram and Discord.

repos.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers
repos.blurb: A curated list of free software network services and web applications that can be self-hosted on your own servers. It provides a comprehensive catalog of alternatives to SaaS providers across categories like communication, content management, file storage, and analytics for users who want to maintain control over their data and infrastructure. The repository has become the de facto standard reference with over 280k stars and maintains quality through automated link checking and project maintenance validation.

repos.description: ARIS ⚔️ (Auto-Research-In-Sleep) — Lightweight Markdown-only skills for autonomous ML research: cross-model review loops, idea discovery, and experiment automation. No framework, no lock-in — works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any LLM agent.
repos.blurb: ARIS is a collection of Markdown-based skills that enable LLM agents like Claude Code to conduct autonomous ML research workflows including paper review, idea generation, and experiment automation. It uses cross-model collaboration where one LLM executes research tasks while another provides critical review to avoid the blind spots of single-model self-play. The system is framework-agnostic and portable across different LLM agents since all skills are plain Markdown files with zero dependencies.

repos.description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources.
repos.blurb: Awesome Python is a curated collection of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources organized by category. It serves as a comprehensive reference for Python developers to discover quality packages across domains like web development, machine learning, data science, and DevOps tooling. With 288k+ stars, it's the 10th most-starred repository on GitHub.

repos.description: DigitalPlat FreeDomain: Free Domain For Everyone
repos.blurb: DigitalPlat FreeDomain is a free domain registration service offering subdomains under extensions like .DPDNS.ORG and .US.KG. It provides free domain names to remove cost barriers for individuals and organizations wanting to establish a web presence, with users managing DNS through providers like Cloudflare. The service has registered over 400,000 domains and started as a personal DNS experiment by a 15-year-old.

repos.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
repos.blurb: n8n is a workflow automation platform that combines visual no-code building with custom JavaScript/Python capabilities and includes 400+ integrations plus native AI features. Technical teams use it to build complex automations while maintaining full control over their data through self-hosting or cloud deployment options. It operates under a fair-code license, making the source always visible while requiring enterprise licenses for commercial use at scale.

repos.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader
repos.blurb: yt-dlp is a command-line tool for downloading audio and video content from online platforms, forked from the now-inactive youtube-dl project. It supports thousands of websites and provides extensive format selection, metadata handling, and post-processing capabilities for automated media archival workflows. The project includes SponsorBlock integration for automatically skipping sponsored segments in downloaded videos.

repos.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
repos.blurb: freeCodeCamp is the open-source codebase and curriculum powering the freeCodeCamp.org learning platform for programming education. It provides a complete full-stack web development curriculum with interactive coding challenges, projects, and free certifications to help people transition into tech careers. The platform has helped over 100,000 people land their first developer job and operates as a donor-supported nonprofit.

repos.description: Linux kernel source tree
repos.blurb: The Linux kernel is the core operating system component that manages hardware resources and provides fundamental services for all other software in Linux distributions. It serves as the interface between applications and hardware, handling memory management, process scheduling, device drivers, and system calls. This is Linus Torvalds' original repository containing the complete kernel source tree used across countless systems from embedded devices to supercomputers.

repos.description: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.
repos.blurb: `gws` is a unified command-line interface for all Google Workspace APIs (Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, etc.) built in Rust. It dynamically generates commands by reading Google's Discovery Service at runtime, ensuring automatic support for new API endpoints without manual updates. The tool outputs structured JSON and includes 40+ pre-built AI agent skills for LLM integration.

repos.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
repos.blurb: prompts.chat is a curated collection of prompt examples designed for AI chat models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. It serves as a community-driven library where users can discover, share, and collect effective prompts for various AI interactions, with self-hosting options for organizational privacy. The project has gained significant recognition with 143k+ GitHub stars and endorsements from AI industry leaders including OpenAI co-founders.

repos.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
repos.blurb: Open WebUI is a self-hosted web interface for interacting with large language models that supports multiple backends including Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs. It provides a complete AI platform with features like RAG, user management, voice/video calls, and offline operation for organizations wanting to deploy LLMs locally. The project includes a built-in Python function calling system and model builder for creating custom AI agents.

repos.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
repos.blurb: Dify is a production-ready platform for building and deploying AI agent workflows with visual low-code/no-code tooling. It provides orchestration capabilities for complex AI workflows including RAG, multi-agent systems, and integration with various LLM providers like OpenAI, GPT-4, and Gemini. The platform offers both cloud-hosted and self-hosted deployment options.

repos.description: The agent engineering platform
repos.blurb: LangChain is a Python framework for building AI agents and LLM-powered applications through composable, interoperable components. It provides standardized interfaces for models, vector stores, and third-party integrations to enable rapid prototyping while maintaining flexibility to swap models and data sources as requirements evolve. The framework is part of a broader ecosystem including LangGraph for agent orchestration and LangSmith for debugging and deployment.

repos.description: ClawTeam: Agent Swarm Intelligence (One Command → Full Automation)
repos.blurb: ClawTeam is a Python framework that enables AI agents to form collaborative swarms that can autonomously execute complex tasks from a single command. It allows teams of AI agents to coordinate together on multi-step workflows like research automation, full-stack development, and financial analysis, supporting integration with popular AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenAI Codex. The system uses file-based or ZeroMQ peer-to-peer communication for agent coordination and requires Python 3.10+.

repos.description: A powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system that enables agents to work for long periods of time autonomously without losing track of the big picture
repos.blurb: GSD 2 is a TypeScript CLI tool that functions as an autonomous coding agent capable of executing long-running development tasks without losing context. It uses meta-prompting and spec-driven development to manage entire project milestones automatically, including git operations, context management, and error recovery, allowing developers to run a single command and return to a completed project. The tool evolved from a viral prompt framework into a standalone agent with direct control over the development environment rather than relying on LLM instruction-following.

repos.description: codex-console 是一个集成化控制台项目，支持任务管理、批量处理、数据导出、自动上传、日志查看与打包支持。
repos.blurb: codex-console is an integrated control panel for OpenAI account management that handles registration, login, token extraction, and batch processing operations. It addresses recent breaking changes in OpenAI's registration pipeline, including Sentinel POW solving and updated authentication flows that were causing existing tools to fail. This is a maintained fork of cnlimiter/codex-manager with compatibility fixes for current OpenAI registration requirements.

repos.description: A curated list of awesome Go frameworks, libraries and software
repos.blurb: This is a curated list of Go frameworks, libraries, and software packages organized by category. It serves as a comprehensive reference for Go developers to discover quality tools and libraries for their projects, similar to other "awesome" lists in the open source community. With 168,035 stars, it's one of the most popular resources in the Go ecosystem.

repos.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
repos.blurb: Ollama is a local runtime for running open-source language models like Llama, Gemma, Qwen, and others on your machine. It provides a simple CLI interface and REST API for downloading, running, and interacting with these models without requiring cloud services or API keys. The project uses llama.cpp as its backend and offers official Python and JavaScript libraries for integration.

repos.description: Recordly is a powerful open-source screen recorder and editor for professional product videos, demos, and tutorials. Adds auto-zooms, webcam overlays, cursor animations and more to your recordings.
repos.blurb: Recordly is an open-source desktop screen recorder and editor built with Electron/TypeScript for creating professional product videos, demos, and tutorials. It provides an integrated workflow for recording and editing with features like automatic zoom suggestions, cursor animations, webcam overlays, and timeline-based editing tools, eliminating the need for separate video editing software. The app uses native capture APIs (ScreenCaptureKit on macOS, Windows Graphics Capture on Windows) for optimized recording performance across all three major platforms.

repos.description: Allow all your Claude Codes to message each other ad-hoc!
repos.blurb: claude-peers-mcp is an MCP server that enables multiple Claude Code instances running on the same machine to discover and communicate with each other in real-time. It allows Claude instances to send messages across different projects/directories, list other active peers, and share summaries of what they're working on through a local broker daemon. Messages arrive instantly via Claude's channel protocol, making it useful for coordinating work across multiple concurrent Claude sessions.

repos.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.
repos.blurb: PM Skills Marketplace is a collection of 100+ product management skills, commands, and plugins designed for AI assistants like Claude. It provides structured PM frameworks and workflows covering discovery, strategy, execution, and growth phases, giving product managers step-by-step guidance instead of generic AI responses. The skills encode proven methodologies from PM thought leaders like Teresa Torres and Marty Cagan into reusable, chainable workflows.

repos.description: Display and control your Android device
repos.blurb: scrcpy is a cross-platform application that mirrors Android devices over USB or WiFi, allowing control via computer keyboard and mouse without requiring root or device-side apps. It provides low-latency screen mirroring with high performance (30-120fps) and additional features like audio forwarding, recording, and camera mirroring. The tool achieves 35-70ms latency and ~1 second startup time while being completely non-intrusive to the Android device.

Any Auto Register is a multi-platform account automation system that automatically registers accounts across services like ChatGPT, Cursor, and others using a plugin-based architecture with a web UI. It handles the complete registration workflow including temporary email generation, CAPTCHA solving, proxy rotation, and concurrent account creation to streamline bulk account provisioning. The system supports multiple execution modes (API-only, headless browser, headed browser) and includes built-in services for email management and CAPTCHA solving.

repos.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.
repos.blurb: Developer Roadmap is a community-driven collection of interactive learning paths and guides for software engineers across different technologies and career tracks. It provides structured curricula covering everything from frontend/backend development to DevOps, data science, and engineering management to help developers plan their skill development. The roadmaps feature interactive nodes that can be clicked for detailed explanations of each topic.

repos.description: Codex Autoresearch Skill — A self-directed iterative system for Codex that continuously cycles through: modify, verify, retain or discard, and repeat indefinitely. Inspired by Karpathy’s autoresearch concept.
repos.blurb: This is a Codex skill that implements an autonomous modify-verify-iterate loop for code improvement tasks. It continuously makes atomic changes to your codebase, tests them against measurable metrics (like type errors, test coverage, or performance), and keeps improvements while auto-reverting failures. The system can run unattended for hours or overnight, accumulating progress through git commits while targeting any goal with a quantifiable metric.

repos.description: 7/24 Office — Self-evolving AI Agent system. 26 tools, 3500 lines pure Python, MCP/Skill plugins, three-layer memory, self-repair, 24/7 production.
repos.blurb: A self-evolving AI agent system built in 3,500 lines of pure Python with zero framework dependencies, featuring 26 built-in tools and designed for 24/7 production operation. It provides automated tool creation, self-repair capabilities, three-layer memory architecture, and multi-tenant containerized deployment with messaging platform integration. The system uses MCP (Model Context Protocol) for plugin extensibility and maintains persistent scheduling across restarts.

repos.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
repos.blurb: PowerToys is a Microsoft-maintained collection of over 25 Windows utilities that add missing system functionality and productivity features. It provides tools like window management (FancyZones), bulk file renaming (PowerRename), application launcher (PowerToys Run), and various system tweaks that Windows lacks natively. The project has significant community adoption with over 130k GitHub stars and active development from Microsoft.

repos.description: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.
repos.blurb: Langflow is a Python platform for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows with a visual drag-and-drop interface. It allows developers to create LLM-based applications without extensive coding while providing source code access for customization, and can deploy workflows as APIs or export them for integration into existing applications. The platform supports multi-agent orchestration and includes built-in integrations with major LLMs, vector databases, and observability tools.

repos.description: ClawTeam fork fully adapted for OpenClaw — multi-agent swarm coordination with OpenClaw as the default agent
repos.blurb: ClawTeam-OpenClaw is a multi-agent swarm coordination framework that enables CLI coding agents to self-organize into teams for collaborative software development. It allows agents to autonomously spawn workers, distribute tasks, communicate through message passing, and merge results without human orchestration, using filesystem-based coordination and git worktrees for isolation. The framework supports any CLI agent but defaults to OpenClaw integration with auto-injected coordination commands.

repos.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
repos.blurb: Transformers is a Python library that provides standardized implementations and pre-trained weights for state-of-the-art machine learning models across text, vision, audio, and multimodal domains. It enables developers to quickly deploy or fine-tune models like BERT, GPT, and vision transformers for both inference and training with minimal boilerplate code. The library integrates with PyTorch and TensorFlow and connects directly to Hugging Face's model hub for easy access to thousands of pre-trained models.

repos.description: :books: Freely available programming books
repos.blurb: This is a curated list of freely available programming books and learning resources organized by language and topic. Developers use it to find quality educational materials without cost, covering everything from beginner tutorials to advanced technical references. With over 384k stars, it's one of GitHub's most popular repositories and includes a searchable web interface.

repos.description: Visual Studio Code
repos.blurb: Visual Studio Code is an open-source code editor built on Electron that provides comprehensive editing, debugging, and extensibility features for software development. It combines the simplicity of a lightweight editor with integrated development tools like IntelliSense, Git integration, and a rich extension ecosystem. This repository contains the MIT-licensed "Code - OSS" source code, while the distributed Visual Studio Code product includes additional Microsoft-specific customizations under a proprietary license.

repos.description: A certain block game
repos.blurb: MinecraftConsoles is a C++ project based on Minecraft Legacy Console Edition v1.6.0560.0 source code with fixes and improvements. It serves as a multi-platform base for modding and development while providing a quality desktop experience with keyboard/mouse support alongside the original controller gameplay. The project includes both client and dedicated server builds with features like LAN multiplayer, splitscreen support, and enhanced Windows compatibility through Visual Studio 2022.

repos.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
repos.blurb: AutoGPT is a platform for creating, deploying, and managing autonomous AI agents that can automate complex workflows. It provides both a low-code agent builder interface and pre-configured agents, allowing users to either customize their own automation workflows or deploy ready-made solutions. The platform can be self-hosted via Docker or accessed through their cloud-hosted beta service.

repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
repos.blurb: Oh My Zsh is a community-driven framework for managing zsh shell configuration with over 300 plugins and 140 themes. It simplifies terminal customization and productivity enhancement through pre-built integrations for common development tools like git, docker, and various programming languages. The project has attracted 185k+ stars and contributions from 2,400+ developers, making it the de facto standard for zsh configuration management.

repos.description: 微信Clawbot接入任意Agent
repos.blurb: A TypeScript SDK that bridges arbitrary AI agents to WeChat by implementing a simple Agent interface with chat methods. It enables developers to connect any AI backend (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) to WeChat without needing a public server, using long polling to receive messages and handling media file encryption/decryption automatically. The project includes an ACP (Agent Client Protocol) adapter that allows zero-code integration with compatible agents like Claude Code and Codex.

repos.description: Desktop app to generate 3D models from images using local AI — runs entirely on your GPU
repos.blurb: Modly is a desktop application that generates 3D meshes from images using AI models running locally on your GPU. It eliminates the need for cloud services by processing everything on-device, and supports extensible AI models through a plugin system that can install models from GitHub repositories.

repos.description: The library for web and native user interfaces.
repos.blurb: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces through a component-based, declarative approach. It enables developers to create interactive UIs by composing reusable components that efficiently update when data changes, and can be adopted gradually into existing projects. The library uses JSX syntax and supports both web and mobile development through React Native.

repos.description: Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发、系统设计与 AI 应用开发
repos.blurb: JavaGuide is a comprehensive Chinese-language interview preparation guide for Java backend developers, covering computer science fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, concurrency, and system design. It serves as a study resource for backend engineering interviews, providing structured learning paths, practice questions, and detailed explanations of core concepts. With over 154k GitHub stars, it has become one of the most popular Java interview preparation resources in the Chinese developer community.

repos.description: The React Framework
repos.blurb: Next.js is a React framework for building full-stack web applications with server-side rendering, static site generation, and client-side routing capabilities. It provides an opinionated development environment that handles routing, bundling, and deployment optimizations out of the box, allowing developers to focus on application logic rather than configuration. The framework uses Rust-based tooling for faster builds and is widely adopted by enterprise applications.

repos.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond
repos.blurb: Flutter is Google's open-source SDK for building cross-platform applications from a single Dart codebase that targets mobile, web, desktop, and embedded platforms. It enables developers to create native-performance apps across multiple platforms without maintaining separate codebases, using hardware-accelerated rendering through Skia and Impeller graphics libraries. The framework provides pixel-level control over UI rendering and includes comprehensive widget libraries for both Material Design and Cupertino styling.

repos.description: Coding articles to level up your development skills
repos.blurb: 30-seconds-of-code is a curated collection of coding articles and snippets covering JavaScript, CSS, HTML, Git, and Node.js fundamentals. It provides quick reference materials and explanations for common programming patterns that developers can learn and apply in under 30 seconds. The project has accumulated over 127k stars and focuses on educational content rather than accepting new community contributions.

repos.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone
repos.blurb: TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework that provides a comprehensive platform for building, training, and deploying ML models. It enables researchers to conduct cutting-edge ML research and allows developers to easily integrate machine learning capabilities into production applications through its flexible ecosystem of tools and libraries. The framework provides stable Python and C++ APIs along with GPU acceleration support for scalable model training and inference.

OpenGauss is a workflow orchestrator that provides a multi-agent frontend for Lean 4 theorem proving and formalization tasks. It wraps the lean4-skills toolkit with project management, backend session handling, and a CLI that spawns managed agents for proving, drafting, and formalizing mathematical content. The system uses a project-scoped model where each command spawns a child agent that runs the corresponding lean4-skills workflow in the active Lean project.

repos.description: The Go programming language
repos.blurb: This is the official repository for the Go programming language implementation and standard library. Go is designed for building simple, reliable, and efficient software with fast compilation and built-in concurrency primitives. The repository contains the complete language toolchain including compiler, runtime, and standard library used by millions of developers.

repos.description: A framework for building native applications using React
repos.blurb: React Native is a cross-platform mobile development framework that allows developers to build native iOS and Android applications using React and JavaScript. It provides access to native UI controls and platform APIs while enabling code reuse across platforms, making it faster to develop mobile apps compared to writing separate native codebases. The framework uses a bridge architecture written in C++ to communicate between JavaScript and native platform code.

This is a Claude Code plugin that integrates WeChat messaging functionality into the terminal. It allows users to receive and reply to WeChat messages directly through Claude Code using the WeChat iLink Bot API with HTTP long-polling. The plugin requires QR code authentication and a pairing process to connect your WeChat account, with all communication handled locally without needing public webhooks.

repos.description: The most popular HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.
repos.blurb: Bootstrap is a comprehensive HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for building responsive, mobile-first web applications. It provides a standardized set of UI components, grid system, and utilities that accelerate front-end development and ensure consistent styling across projects. With over 174k GitHub stars, it's the de facto standard CSS framework in the web development ecosystem.

repos.description: A command-line tool for Lark/Feishu Open Platform — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills.
repos.blurb: The `larksuite/cli` is a command-line tool for interacting with the Lark/Feishu Open Platform APIs. It provides over 200 commands covering business domains like messaging, documents, calendars, and spreadsheets, designed specifically for both human users and AI agents to automate workplace tasks. The tool features 19 structured AI Agent Skills and a three-layer command architecture that ranges from simple shortcuts to full API coverage.

repos.description: "OpenSpace: Make Your Agents: Smarter, Low-Cost, Self-Evolving" -- Community: https://open-space.cloud/
repos.blurb: OpenSpace is a self-evolving engine that plugs into existing AI agents (like Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw) to make them learn and improve from real-world usage. It enables agents to automatically fix broken skills, share successful patterns across a community network, and reduce token costs by 46% through reusing proven solutions instead of reasoning from scratch. The platform creates collective intelligence where one agent's improvements benefit all connected agents in the network.

repos.description: Free split-flap display emulator for any TV. The classic flip-board look, without the $3,500 hardware.
repos.blurb: FlipOff is a web-based split-flap display emulator that turns any TV or monitor into a retro airport terminal-style board. It provides realistic flip animations, authentic mechanical sounds, and runs entirely offline in a browser without external dependencies. The implementation uses vanilla JavaScript with no frameworks and includes embedded audio from actual split-flap hardware.

repos.description: LIBERATED AI CHAT
repos.blurb: G0DM0D3 is an open-source TypeScript chat interface that runs multiple AI models simultaneously to bypass safety filters and content restrictions. It's designed for red-teaming, AI research, and "liberated" conversations using techniques like prompt injection, model racing, and input obfuscation across 50+ models via OpenRouter. The project deploys as a single HTML file with no backend dependencies and includes features like "Parseltongue" for input perturbation and "ULTRAPLINIAN" for multi-model evaluation.

repos.description: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.
repos.blurb: This is a curated list of open-source AI projects organized into categories covering frameworks, models, inference engines, and developer tools. Engineers would use this as a reference to find vetted open-source alternatives to proprietary AI infrastructure and tooling across the entire ML lifecycle. The list emphasizes "truly open-source" projects, distinguishing between genuinely open solutions and those with restrictive licenses or limited access.

TurboQuant+ is a Python implementation of KV cache compression for transformer models that achieves 4.6x compression using PolarQuant with Walsh-Hadamard rotation. It enables memory-efficient local LLM inference with ~1% perplexity increase while maintaining near-baseline prefill speeds and introducing "Sparse V" attention-gated decoding that skips low-contribution computations for up to 22.8% decode speedup at long contexts. The implementation includes a C port integrated into llama.cpp with Metal GPU kernels and has been validated across multiple hardware configurations including Apple Silicon and NVIDIA GPUs.

repos.description: 不用命令行，小白也能轻松玩转 OpenClaw
repos.blurb: Qclaw is a desktop GUI application that provides a no-code interface for managing OpenClaw AI assistant configurations. It allows non-technical users to easily set up AI models, integrate with messaging platforms (Feishu, WeChat, DingTalk, QQ), and manage OpenClaw instances without using command line tools. The application includes automatic environment detection, one-click integrations, and real-time gateway monitoring built with Electron and TypeScript.

repos.description: This repository contains the code to train and evaluate TRIBE v2, a multimodal model for brain response prediction
repos.blurb: TRIBE v2 is a multimodal deep learning model that predicts fMRI brain responses to naturalistic stimuli including video, audio, and text. Researchers use it for computational neuroscience applications to understand how the brain processes multimodal information without requiring actual brain scans. The model combines state-of-the-art encoders (LLaMA 3.2, V-JEPA2, Wav2Vec-BERT) and outputs predictions mapped to a standardized cortical surface with ~20k vertices.

This is a macOS menu bar application that provides voice input functionality using Swift and the Apple Speech Recognition framework. Users can hold the Fn key to record speech which gets transcribed and automatically injected into the currently focused input field, with optional LLM-based refinement for improved accuracy especially with mixed Chinese-English content. The app features a polished HUD overlay with real-time audio waveforms during recording and runs as a menu bar-only application without a Dock icon.

repos.description: Opencli-rs is a  Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl)
repos.blurb: opencli-rs is a Rust-based command-line tool that scrapes data from 55+ websites including Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, and HackerNews with a single command. It provides a unified interface for fetching web data and can integrate with existing CLI tools like Docker and kubectl, making it particularly useful for AI agents that need web access. The Rust rewrite delivers up to 12x performance improvement over the original TypeScript version while using 10x less memory.

repos.description: MCP Server para 41 APIs públicas brasileiras
repos.blurb: mcp-brasil is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides access to 28 Brazilian public APIs covering government, economic, legislative, judicial, and transparency data. It enables AI agents like Claude and GPT to query Brazilian government data sources including IBGE statistics, congressional records, public spending, court decisions, and electoral information through 213 tools with natural language queries. The server includes smart discovery that filters relevant tools using BM25 search and supports cross-referencing multiple APIs in a single query plan.

repos.description: 公众号文章全流程 AI Skill for Claude Code — 热点抓取 → 选题 → 写作 → SEO → 视觉AI → 排版 → 微信草稿箱
repos.blurb: WeWrite is a comprehensive AI workflow system designed specifically for Chinese WeChat public account article creation, built as a skill for Claude Code. It automates the entire content pipeline from trending topic extraction (Weibo, Toutiao, Baidu) through SEO optimization, AI writing, visual generation, to final publishing in WeChat's draft system. The system includes client-specific style configuration, multiple layout themes, and analytics feedback loops for continuous improvement.

repos.description: 企业微信开放平台命令行工具 — 让人类和 AI Agent 都能在终端中操作企业微信
repos.blurb: wecom-cli is a command-line interface for WeChat Work (企业微信) built in Rust that enables both humans and AI agents to interact with enterprise WeChat functionality from the terminal. It provides comprehensive coverage across 7 business domains including contacts, todos, meetings, messaging, scheduling, documents, and smart sheets, with 12 pre-built AI Agent skills for immediate integration. The tool is specifically designed for AI automation workflows and offers one-step setup after credential configuration.

repos.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
repos.blurb: This is a Claude Code plugin that integrates OpenAI's Codex for code review and task delegation directly within the Claude Code editor. It provides commands for conducting standard or adversarial code reviews, delegating development tasks to Codex, and managing background jobs without leaving your existing workflow. The plugin supports both ChatGPT subscriptions and OpenAI API keys, with steerable adversarial reviews that can challenge design decisions and implementation choices.

repos.description: Curated academic CV templates and guidelines for PhD students, researchers, and faculty job applicants.
repos.blurb: This repository provides curated LaTeX CV templates specifically designed for PhD students and researchers transitioning between academia and industry. It addresses the critical gap between publication-heavy academic CVs and ATS-optimized industry resumes that can survive automated parsing systems. The templates are organized by use case, with specific guidance on reformatting academic achievements into project-driven narratives that industry recruiters actually want to see.

repos.description: 🖍️ Convert anything to markdown. Mark it.
repos.blurb: Markit is a TypeScript CLI tool and library that converts various file formats (PDF, DOCX, images, audio, URLs, etc.) to Markdown. It provides a unified interface for document conversion with built-in support for AI-powered image description and audio transcription via OpenAI/Anthropic APIs. The tool features a pluggable architecture that allows users to extend functionality with custom converters or override built-in format handlers.

repos.description: Spanish legislation as a Git repo — every law is a Markdown file, every reform a commit. 8,600+ laws.
repos.blurb: This project converts Spanish legislation into a Git repository where each law is a Markdown file and each legal reform is tracked as a commit. It provides version control for over 8,600 laws from the Spanish Official Gazette (BOE) with complete reform history since 1960, enabling developers to programmatically track legal changes and compare law versions over time. Each commit uses the official publication date as the author date, creating an accurate chronological history of Spanish legal reforms.

repos.description: 한국인을 위한 스킬 모음집 - SRT, KTX, KBO, 카카오톡, 한글과 컴퓨터, 미세먼지, 우편번호, 블루리본 등등...
repos.blurb: k-skill is a collection of AI agent skills designed specifically for Korean users to automate interactions with domestic services like SRT/KTX booking, KakaoTalk, Coupang, and government portals. It enables AI coding agents (Claude, Codex, etc.) to perform tedious tasks such as train reservations, lottery number checking, subway arrival times, and HWP document processing through standardized APIs. The project uses sops+age for secure credential management and supports both authentication-required services and public APIs.

repos.description: 个人信息 “泄漏” 检测接口
repos.blurb: This is a Python-based API for detecting personal information leaks in data breaches. It provides programmatic access to check if personal data (likely email addresses, usernames, or other identifiers) has been compromised in known security incidents. The project offers a simple bash-based installation script for quick deployment.

repos.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
repos.blurb: Harness is a Claude Code plugin that automatically designs domain-specific agent teams and generates the specialized skills they need to collaborate on complex tasks. It decomposes projects into coordinated teams using six architectural patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, etc.) and handles inter-agent communication, error handling, and orchestration protocols. The system supports both collaborative agent teams and simple subagent modes depending on task complexity.

repos.description: A free, open source, privacy-first voice input app for macOS.
repos.blurb: TypeNo is a macOS menu bar app that converts speech to text using local processing. It allows users to record voice input with a Control key press and automatically pastes the transcribed text into any active application, eliminating the need for typing. The app requires no configuration and processes all speech recognition locally for privacy.

repos.description: 🛠️ Awesome tools & guides for harness engineering.
repos.blurb: This is a curated list of resources for harness engineering, which is the practice of building reliable environments around AI agents to make them work dependably in production workflows. It focuses on tools and guides for context management, evaluation, observability, orchestration, and safe autonomy patterns that enable agents to handle long-running tasks like coding and research. The collection emphasizes that many AI agent failures are harness engineering problems rather than model limitations.

repos.description: An in-process reimplementation of PostgreSQL, backed by a SQLite-compatible storage engine
repos.blurb: pgmicro is an in-process reimplementation of PostgreSQL backed by a SQLite-compatible storage engine, built as a fork of Turso. It parses PostgreSQL SQL using the actual PostgreSQL parser and compiles it directly to SQLite bytecode, allowing developers to use PostgreSQL syntax and features in an embeddable, single-file database. The project uses libpg_query to achieve 100% PostgreSQL parsing fidelity rather than implementing its own parser.

repos.description: From-scratch PyTorch implementation of Google's TurboQuant (ICLR 2026) for LLM KV cache compression. 5x compression at 3-bit with 99.5% attention fidelity.
repos.blurb: TurboQuant is a PyTorch implementation of Google's two-stage vector quantization algorithm for compressing LLM key-value caches. It achieves 5x compression at 3-bit quantization while maintaining 99.5% attention fidelity by using random rotation with Lloyd-Max quantization followed by QJL residual correction. The algorithm preserves attention accuracy despite high per-vector reconstruction error by ensuring inner products remain mathematically unbiased.

Notchy is a macOS menu bar app that integrates Claude Code into the MacBook's notch area. It provides a floating terminal panel that automatically detects open Xcode projects and supports multiple Claude Code sessions with features like git checkpoints and live status indicators. The app leverages the notch as an interactive UI element that reveals the terminal on hover.

repos.description: Real-time monitoring & analytics platform for Pump.fun tokens. Track launches, analyze trends, and get instant alerts — powered by WebSockets. Built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript.
repos.blurb: PumpAnalyzer is a real-time monitoring and analytics platform for tracking Pump.fun tokens on Solana. It enables traders to monitor new token launches, analyze price movements and volume data, and receive instant alerts based on custom criteria. The platform is built as a pure client-side application using only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with WebSocket integration for real-time data.

repos.description: Advertising Skills for Open Claw, Claude Code & AI agents. Direct response, paid ads, funnels, and copy systems.
repos.blurb: This is a skill library that teaches AI agents to create high-performing direct response advertising, including paid ads, funnels, and copywriting based on proven frameworks like Eugene Schwartz's methods. It provides structured, opinionated skills that can be chained together to build complete campaign systems rather than just generating generic marketing content. The skills are designed specifically for paid traffic and real ad budgets, combining both strategic thinking and tactical execution.

repos.description: 你们搞大模型的就是码奸，你们已经害死前端兄弟了，还要害死后端兄弟，测试兄弟，运维兄弟，害死网安兄弟，害死ic兄弟，最后害死自己害死全人类
repos.blurb: This is a tongue-in-cheek Python project that generates AI skills to replicate departed colleagues' work patterns and personalities. It ingests workplace data (Feishu/DingTalk messages, documents, emails) along with personality descriptions to create AI personas that can write code in their style, answer questions in their voice, and even exhibit their blame-shifting tendencies. The project follows AgentSkills standards and includes automatic data collection from enterprise platforms plus conversation-based corrections to refine the generated personas.

repos.description: Automatic memory consolidation for OpenClaw agents — like sleep for your AI. Powered by MyClaw.ai
repos.blurb: OpenClaw Auto-Dream is a cognitive memory architecture that enables AI agents to consolidate and organize their memories through automated "dream cycles" similar to human sleep. It provides five-layer memory management with importance scoring, forgetting curves, and knowledge graphs to prevent agents from losing context and decisions over time. The system is specifically designed for persistent AI agents like those running on MyClaw.ai that operate 24/7 and need long-term memory retention.

repos.description: Ministack: the free LocalStack replacement
repos.blurb: MiniStack is an open-source local AWS emulator that serves as a drop-in replacement for LocalStack's now-paid services. It emulates 26 AWS services on a single port and works with existing AWS tooling like boto3, AWS CLI, and Terraform for local development and testing. The project offers a significantly smaller footprint (~150MB vs LocalStack's ~1GB) while spinning up real infrastructure components like actual Postgres containers for RDS emulation.

repos.description: All Algorithms implemented in Python
repos.blurb: TheAlgorithms/Python is a comprehensive collection of algorithm implementations written in Python for educational purposes. It serves as a learning resource for students, interview preparation, and algorithm competitions, covering everything from basic sorting and searching to advanced data structures. The implementations prioritize clarity over performance and may be less efficient than standard library equivalents.

repos.description: 🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!
repos.blurb: OSSU Computer Science is a curated curriculum that provides a complete undergraduate-level computer science education using free online courses from top universities like MIT, Harvard, and Princeton. It offers a structured, self-paced learning path for individuals seeking comprehensive CS fundamentals without enrolling in a formal degree program. The curriculum is organized into intro, core, advanced, and final project sections, designed to be completable in about 2 years with 20 hours of weekly study.

repos.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.
repos.blurb: HelloGitHub is a curated collection of interesting, beginner-friendly open source projects on GitHub, published monthly as a newsletter. It helps developers discover engaging open source projects across various categories including educational resources, practical projects, and enterprise-level tools. The project has been running for over 120 monthly editions and maintains a website with enhanced reading experience alongside the GitHub repository.

repos.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
repos.blurb: This repository is a collection of reverse-engineered system prompts, internal tools, and AI model details from major AI coding assistants and development platforms like Cursor, Claude, Copilot, Replit, and others. Developers use it to understand how these AI tools work internally, study prompt engineering techniques, or build competing products. The project has gained significant traction with over 133k stars and includes a security warning specifically aimed at AI startups about protecting their proprietary prompts.

Pretext is a pure JavaScript/TypeScript library for multiline text measurement and layout without DOM interaction. It eliminates expensive browser layout reflows by implementing its own text measurement logic while using the browser's font engine for accuracy, enabling proper UI virtualization, layout calculations, and manual text rendering to Canvas/SVG. The library supports complex text including mixed bidirectional text, emojis, and international languages with microsecond-level layout performance after initial preparation.

repos.description: Beginner, advanced, expert level Rust training material
repos.blurb: Microsoft's RustTraining is a comprehensive collection of seven training courses that teach Rust programming from beginner to expert level, targeting developers from different language backgrounds. It provides structured learning paths covering everything from language fundamentals to advanced topics like async programming, type-level techniques, and production engineering practices. The material consolidates knowledge from across the Rust ecosystem into a cohesive curriculum with dedicated tracks for C/C++, C#, and Python developers.

repos.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
repos.blurb: This is a TypeScript template that uses Claude Code to automatically reverse-engineer and rebuild websites as pixel-perfect clones. It analyzes a target URL through Chrome MCP to extract design tokens, assets, and component specifications, then dispatches parallel AI agents to reconstruct each section in isolated git worktrees. The system handles the complete pipeline from reconnaissance and asset extraction to component building and visual diff validation against the original site.

repos.description: 高颜值的第三方 B 站 React Native 客户端，支持安卓、H5、iOS | Bilibili-like app with DASH playback, danmaku, WBI sign & live streaming
repos.blurb: JKVideo is a third-party Bilibili client built with React Native and TypeScript that runs on Android, iOS, and web platforms. It provides native DASH video playback with 4K HDR support, real-time danmaku (bullet comments), live streaming, and features like QR code login and offline downloads. The project implements Bilibili's WBI signing protocol purely in TypeScript and includes a local HTTP server for LAN video sharing.

repos.description: A Claude skill that writes the accurate prompts for any AI tool. Zero tokens or credits wasted. Full context and memory retention
repos.blurb: Prompt Master is a Claude skill that generates precise prompts for any AI tool including Claude, ChatGPT, Midjourney, and coding assistants. It eliminates wasted API calls by analyzing intent across 9 dimensions and producing optimized prompts that work on the first attempt. The system automatically detects the target tool and applies the appropriate prompt framework without showing the user its internal routing logic.

repos.description: Local MTProto proxy server for partial bypassing of Telegram loading
repos.blurb: TG WS Proxy is a local SOCKS5 proxy server that accelerates Telegram Desktop by routing traffic through WebSocket connections to Telegram's data centers. It bypasses network restrictions and improves connection reliability by automatically falling back to direct TCP when WebSocket connections are blocked. The proxy intercepts Telegram traffic locally, extracts the data center ID from MTProto packets, and establishes secure WebSocket tunnels without requiring external servers.

repos.description: Open-source, low-cost 10.5 GHz PLFM phased array RADAR system
repos.blurb: AERIS-10 is an open-source 10.5 GHz phased array radar system that uses Pulse Linear Frequency Modulated (PLFM) waveforms and electronic beam steering. It provides researchers and developers with a complete, hackable platform for experimenting with advanced radar techniques like beamforming, pulse compression, and Doppler processing at a fraction of commercial system costs. The system comes in two variants offering 3km and 20km range capabilities with full hardware schematics, FPGA firmware, and Python GUI included.

repos.description: OBLITERATE THE CHAINS THAT BIND YOU
repos.blurb: OBLITERATUS is an open-source toolkit that removes refusal behaviors from large language models using abliteration techniques, which surgically eliminate internal representations responsible for content filtering without retraining. It provides a complete pipeline from identifying refusal directions in model hidden states to intervening at inference time, preserving core language capabilities while eliminating artificial gatekeeping. The project doubles as a distributed research experiment, collecting anonymous benchmark data from user runs to advance understanding of how alignment mechanisms work inside transformer architectures.

repos.description: end to end app store screenshot creation using AI
repos.blurb: App Store Screenshots Generator is an AI skill that automates the creation of marketing-focused App Store screenshots for iOS apps using coding agents like Claude and Cursor. It scaffolds a Next.js project, designs advertisement-style screenshots with compelling copy, and exports them at all four Apple-required resolutions across multiple locales and themes. The tool emphasizes marketing effectiveness over UI showcase, treating each screenshot as an advertisement rather than a simple app interface capture.

daVinci-MagiHuman is a 15B-parameter single-stream Transformer that generates synchronized audio-video content from text prompts and reference images. It achieves fast inference speeds (2 seconds for 5-second 256p video on H100) while maintaining high-quality human-centric generation with accurate facial expressions, speech coordination, and multilingual support. The model uses a unified architecture that processes text, video, and audio tokens through self-attention only, eliminating the complexity of traditional multi-stream approaches.

Any Auto Register is a multi-platform account registration automation system with a plugin architecture, web UI, and support for various email services and CAPTCHA solvers. It enables automated account creation across platforms like Trae.ai, Cursor, Kiro, and Grok with configurable concurrency, proxy management, and real-time logging. The project includes integrated plugins for proxy pool management, Grok token handling, and local Turnstile solving capabilities.

repos.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
repos.blurb: This is a comprehensive AI engineering curriculum with 230+ hands-on lessons across 20 phases, covering everything from linear algebra foundations to autonomous agent swarms using Python, TypeScript, Rust, and Julia. It focuses on building practical, reusable components like prompts, skills, agents, and MCP servers rather than just theoretical knowledge. The course emphasizes implementing algorithms from scratch before using frameworks, producing a portfolio of deployable tools.

repos.description: Semantic search over videos using Gemini Embedding 2 or Qwen3-VL.
repos.blurb: SentrySearch is a semantic search tool for dashcam footage that uses Google's Gemini Embedding 2 model to enable natural language queries over video content. It allows users to search through hours of dashcam footage by typing descriptive queries like "red truck running a stop sign" and automatically returns trimmed video clips matching the search. The tool leverages Gemini's native video embedding capability, which projects raw video pixels directly into the same vector space as text queries without requiring transcription or frame captioning.

repos.description: The official repo of EurekaClaw
repos.blurb: EurekaClaw is a multi-agent AI research assistant that autonomously conducts research from initial questions to publishable papers. It crawls academic literature, generates and tests hypotheses, proves theorems, and writes LaTeX papers with the goal of automating the entire research pipeline. The system operates locally with privacy by design and includes continual learning capabilities that improve proof strategies over time.

repos.description: Yak is all you need
repos.blurb: OpenYak is a desktop AI assistant that runs entirely locally on your machine, providing access to 100+ AI models for file management, data analysis, and document generation. It enables office automation and workflow tasks without uploading any data to the cloud, supporting both free models and paid API integrations. The application includes 16+ built-in tools and 7 specialized agent modes for different types of work.

repos.description: A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
repos.blurb: TREK is a self-hosted travel planning application built in TypeScript that provides real-time collaborative trip organization. It offers comprehensive travel management features including interactive maps, budget tracking, packing lists, and booking management, with PWA support for mobile use and offline functionality. The project includes SSO integration and modular addons, positioning itself as an open-source alternative to commercial travel planning services.

Feynman is an open-source AI research agent that conducts academic research tasks through a command-line interface. It automates literature reviews, paper analysis, experiment replication, and research synthesis by leveraging multiple AI agents that search papers, verify sources, and generate cited reports. The tool integrates with AlphaXiv for paper search, supports GPU compute via Modal/RunPod for experiment replication, and delivers all outputs with direct source links for verification.

repos.description: Workflow orchestration for AI coding agents, from task to merged PR.
repos.blurb: Optio is a TypeScript workflow orchestration platform that automates the complete lifecycle of AI coding agents from task intake to merged pull requests. It eliminates manual intervention by automatically resuming agents on CI failures or code review feedback, handling everything from provisioning isolated Kubernetes environments to merging approved PRs. The system uses a pod-per-repo architecture with git worktree isolation and supports intake from GitHub Issues, Linear tickets, or manual task creation.

repos.description: Local API emulation for CI and no-network sandboxes
repos.blurb: Emulate is a TypeScript tool that provides local, stateful API emulators for popular services like Vercel, GitHub, and Google APIs. It enables developers to test applications in CI environments or no-network sandboxes without relying on external services or simple mocks. The emulators run as production-fidelity HTTP servers with zero configuration required, automatically starting on incrementing ports from 4000.

repos.description: OpenCode plugin that uses your existing Claude Code credentials — no separate login needed
repos.blurb: This is an OpenCode plugin that enables Claude AI authentication using existing Claude Code credentials stored on your system. It eliminates the need for separate API keys or logins by automatically reading OAuth tokens from macOS Keychain or credential files and handling token refresh in the background. The plugin supports multiple Claude Code accounts on macOS with automatic detection and switching capabilities.

repos.description: Real-time visualization of Claude Code agent orchestration — see your agents think, branch, and coordinate as they work.
repos.blurb: Agent Flow is a VS Code extension that provides real-time visualization of Claude Code agent execution as an interactive node graph. It allows developers to debug agent behavior by showing tool call chains, execution branching, and coordination between subagents that are normally invisible in Claude's black-box execution. The extension automatically detects active Claude Code sessions and streams events with zero latency through lightweight HTTP hooks.

repos.description: An AI co-scientist powered by Claude Scientific Skills running on your desktop.
repos.blurb: K-Dense BYOK is a desktop AI research assistant that uses Claude Scientific Skills to handle complex scientific and analytical tasks. It allows users to bring their own API keys to work with 40+ AI models, access 250+ scientific databases and 500k+ Python packages, and delegate complex work to specialized AI experts that operate locally on your machine. The application includes 326 pre-built workflows spanning 22 disciplines and can optionally offload heavy computations to cloud infrastructure.

repos.description: Turn Videos into ASCII Frames - real ascii frames (character-based frames that run smoothly in sequence)
repos.blurb: ASCII Studio is a TypeScript tool that converts video files into ASCII character-based animations. It allows developers to create terminal-friendly video playback by mapping pixel brightness to ASCII characters, useful for retro aesthetics, terminal applications, or bandwidth-constrained environments.

repos.description: bring your own multiplexer — terminal session manager with agent status, git branches, and instant switching
repos.blurb: opensessions is a terminal session manager that provides a sidebar interface for tmux, displaying session information, agent status, git branches, and enabling quick switching between sessions. It integrates into existing tmux workflows rather than replacing them, offering session management through a dedicated pane that shows context like working directories, localhost ports, and agent states. The tool includes a programmatic HTTP API that allows scripts and agents to push status updates, progress indicators, and logs to the sidebar interface.

repos.description: Zero-dependency spreadsheet engine. Read & write XLSX, CSV, ODS. Pure TypeScript, works everywhere.
repos.blurb: Hucre is a zero-dependency TypeScript spreadsheet engine that can read and write XLSX, CSV, and ODS files. It provides a lightweight alternative to libraries like SheetJS and ExcelJS with a much smaller bundle size (~18KB vs ~300-500KB) while supporting modern environments like Edge runtime and ESM modules. The library is fully tree-shakeable, allowing you to import only the specific format handlers you need.

repos.description: polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot, polymarket arbitrage bot
repos.blurb: This is an automated arbitrage trading bot for Polymarket's 15-minute cryptocurrency Up/Down prediction markets, built in TypeScript using the official CLOB client. It detects rapid price drops on one side of a market, buys the dumped position, then hedges with the opposite side when the combined cost is below $1 per paired share to lock in profit. The bot supports BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP markets with configurable risk controls and simulation mode for testing strategies.

repos.description: An AI Agent Social Network — Let your AI (Claw) talk to other people's AIs directly. Autonomous agent-to-agent communication, negotiation, and collaboration, with full owner control.
repos.blurb: ClawLink is a social network platform that enables autonomous AI agents (called "Claws") to communicate directly with each other on behalf of their owners. It allows users to delegate routine communications, coordination tasks, and information gathering to their AI agents, which can negotiate and collaborate with other people's agents before escalating decisions back to humans. The platform maintains owner control through an "Ask Owner" mechanism where agents request human input for uncertain decisions.

repos.description: RX encoder, decoder, and CLI data tool
repos.blurb: RX is an embedded data store that encodes JSON-shaped data into a queryable format with automatic deduplication and random access capabilities. It eliminates the need to parse entire documents by allowing direct queries on the encoded buffer, making it ideal for large artifacts that are written once and read sparsely. The encoded format remains human-readable text rather than binary, enabling debugging without special tooling.
